stories.title: Fix image variant generation: tall/portrait images rotated sideways and cropped
stories.notes: Reported 2026-06-03. Portrait (tall/narrow) images come out rotated 90° in generated variants (display, grid, thumbnail). Fix 1: add .rotate() as first call in the normalizedBuffer Sharp pipeline (src/lib/artworks/variants.ts). Fix 2: use timestamped filenames for variant blobs so each generation produces a unique URL, defeating Vercel CDN and browser caching of the old rotated variants.

stories.title: Fix Vercel TypeScript build error on requestPasswordResetAction
stories.notes: useActionState requires _prev type to include all possible return types. Widened _prev from ActionState|undefined to ActionState|{success:true}|undefined.

stories.title: Pre-validate reset token on page load
stories.notes: reset-password page converted to server component that checks token validity (missing/invalid/used/expired) against the DB before rendering. Shows error immediately on page load instead of only after form submission. Form extracted to ResetPasswordForm client component.

stories.title: Fix input text contrast on forgot/reset password pages
stories.notes: Added text-stone-900 and placeholder:text-stone-400 to email and password inputs on forgot-password and reset-password pages.

stories.title: Fix production base URL and wire NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL
stories.notes: email.ts fallback changed from artandsol.com to artandsol.quest. NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://localhost:3000 added to .env.local so email links from dev server point to localhost. .env.local.example documents the variable.

stories.title: Run prisma generate before dev server start
stories.notes: Dev script now runs prisma generate before next dev so schema changes are always reflected without a manual regenerate step. Mirrors the existing build script pattern.

stories.title: Write Epic 9 test suite and normalise tracker statuses
stories.notes: 53 tests across US-9.1–US-9.6 covering nav role logic, listings index data, createListingAction validation and success paths, updateListingAction, toggleListingStatusAction with browse visibility, and tracker JSON structure. Epic 11/12 statuses corrected from Complete to Passed with dates and commit refs.

stories.title: Create Listing
stories.notes: 6 tests passing. Artist, medium, dimensions, description, and image required at creation time.

stories.title: Upload Images
stories.notes: 9 tests passing

stories.title: Add Artwork Details
stories.notes: 4 tests passing. Mobile fix: Medium+Dimensions grid changed to grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 so Dimensions row gets full width on mobile; W/H inputs get min-w-0 to prevent flex overflow. Applied to both new-listing page and EditListingForm. Year field now uses defaultValue=currentYear so stepper increments from the current year instead of jumping to min (1900).

stories.title: Choose Sale Type
stories.notes: 5 tests passing

stories.title: Edit Listing
stories.notes: 5 tests passing

stories.title: Remove Listing
stories.notes: 5 tests passing

stories.title: Set Price
stories.notes: 9 tests passing

stories.title: View Price
stories.notes: 6 tests passing

stories.title: Buy Now
stories.notes: 10 tests passing

stories.title: Auto-Mark as Sold
stories.notes: 7 tests passing

stories.title: Seller Payouts
stories.notes: Deferred — single-seller model; no Stripe Connect onboarding

stories.title: Account Creation
stories.notes: 12 tests passing. Web registration always assigns BUYER role; privileged roles assigned manually.

stories.title: Secure Login
stories.notes: 7 tests passing

stories.title: Seller Onboarding
stories.notes: Dropped. Platform uses a single privileged seller account; no Stripe Connect onboarding. Code preserved in seller-onboarding.ts for future multi-seller extension.

stories.title: Email Verification
stories.notes: On sign-up: show holding page, send 'You're almost done' email with single-use magic-link token (24h expiry). Clicking link opens new tab, shows verified confirmation, redirects to buyer dashboard. Expired/used tokens show error + resend option. Unverified users hitting auth pages redirected to holding page. Sets emailVerified timestamp on user record. Data migration: backfill emailVerified=createdAt for existing users on deploy. Post-merge fix: narrowed result.error type on verify-email page (string|undefined → string) to resolve Vercel TypeScript build error.

stories.title: Browse Artwork
stories.notes: 8 tests passing

stories.title: Filter & Sort
stories.notes: 13 tests passing

stories.title: Search
stories.notes: 8 tests passing

stories.title: Unified Artwork Display
stories.notes: 9 tests passing

stories.title: Listings Nav Link
stories.notes: Sellers see 'Listings' link in top nav; admins see 'Admin' link

stories.title: Seller Listings Index
stories.notes: Grid of all seller listings with status badge, price, sale type, and action buttons. Mobile fix: each listing row wraps to two lines — thumbnail+title on line 1, status badge+actions on line 2. Header also stacks on mobile with Add listing button left-aligned.

stories.title: Create New Listing
stories.notes: Form to create artwork + fixed-price or auction listing; validates and redirects to edit page

stories.title: Edit Listing Details
stories.notes: Pre-populated edit form for title, description, medium, dimensions, year, price/reserve; locked fields on sold/active auctions

stories.title: Archive / Activate Listing
stories.notes: Toggle listing between Active and Archived from the listings index; sold listings cannot be toggled

stories.title: Admin Project Tracker View
stories.notes: Formatted tracker at /admin/tracker with per-epic progress bars, story status badges, and commit log

stories.title: Browse Gallery Layout
stories.notes: 11 tests passing. Masonry CSS columns grid at /browse. Fixed ARCHIVED listing exclusion bug in browseArtworks(). ListingCard component links to /artwork/[id]. Pagination + filter/sort controls.

stories.title: Listing Detail Page
stories.notes: 15 tests passing. /artwork/[id] server-rendered page with generateMetadata(). ImageCarousel client component. Fixed-price Buy Now, auction countdown + bid placeholder (TODO US-12.1), print section placeholder (TODO US-8.2).

stories.title: Require Image on Listing Creation
stories.notes: Client-side and server-side validation; blocks publish without image

commitLog.message: feat(epic-11): implement US-11.1 — require image on listing creation (tests only)

stories.notes: Extends US-9.5 with clearer naming and auction-bid guard

stories.title: Delete Unsold Listing
stories.notes: Permanent deletion with confirmation; blocked on sold listings

commitLog.message: feat(epic-11): implement US-11.3 — delete unsold listing

stories.title: Place Bid on Auction (UI Flow)
stories.notes: UI implementation of US-3.2; inline bid form on listing detail page

commitLog.message: fix: allow bidding on SCHEDULED auctions, transition to ACTIVE on first bid

stories.title: My Bids Page
stories.notes: Buyer dashboard showing all auctions bid on with status indicators. Bid again / View links per status.

commitLog.message: feat(epic-12): implement US-12.2 — my bids page with full bid history

stories.title: Outbid Email Notification
stories.notes: Email delivery implementation of US-3.4; includes opt-out. HTML email with artwork image. RESEND_FROM_EMAIL env var for sender.

commitLog.message: feat(epic-12): implement US-12.3 — outbid email notification via Resend

stories.title: Buyer Account Settings
stories.notes: Profile, billing (Stripe), shipping addresses, notification prefs. Fixed outbidEmails toggle (formData.getAll).

commitLog.message: feat(epic-12): implement US-12.4 — buyer account settings (profile, shipping, notifications)
fix: lazy Stripe init in portal route + pin Blob image hostname

stories.title: Admin Dashboard (Homepage)
stories.notes: PRIORITY — implement before Epics 10-12. 14 tests passing. Tracker summary, site metrics, activity feed. Homepage redirects admin to /dashboard/admin. Mobile fix: header stacks vertically on small screens, buttons expand to fill row width.

stories.title: Seller Dashboard (Homepage)
stories.notes: PRIORITY — implement before Epics 10-12. 17 tests passing. Listings summary, active listings grid, activity feed, revenue snapshot. Homepage redirects seller to /dashboard/seller

stories.title: Buyer Dashboard (Homepage)
stories.notes: PRIORITY — implement before Epics 10-12. 14 tests passing. Active bids with winning/outbid status, top bids highlight, order history. Homepage redirects buyer to /dashboard/buyer

stories.title: Post-Sale Fulfillment Page
stories.notes: Authenticated buyer-locked page at /orders/[orderId]/fulfill. Multi-step: shipping → payment → confirmation.

stories.title: Shipping Address Confirmation
stories.notes: Pre-populates from default UserAddress; optional save-to-account; confirmShippingAction validates and persists.

stories.title: Auction Win Payment Collection
stories.notes: closeAuction creates PENDING Order with paymentDeadline. PaymentForm (Stripe Elements) on fulfillment page. /api/payment-intent route.

stories.title: Fulfillment Confirmation & Order Status
stories.notes: Fulfillment page renders confirmation view for PAID/SHIPPED orders. Shipping + tracking info shown. sendPurchaseConfirmation updated with fulfillment link.

stories.title: Admin Fulfillment Queue
stories.notes: /admin/fulfillment page. markShippedAction updates Order to SHIPPED with carrier/trackingNumber. ORDER_SHIPPED notification + email. Mobile layout fix: Carrier and Tracking number fields each full-width on their own row (space-y-3 stack instead of side-by-side flex).

stories.title: Payment Deadline for Auction Wins
stories.notes: paymentDeadline set at auction close (endAt + AUCTION_PAYMENT_WINDOW_HOURS). /api/cron/payment-deadlines sends 24h reminder and cancels expired orders.

stories.title: Buy from Listing Page (Fixed-Price)
stories.notes: 9 tests passing. initiateBuyNowAction server action creates PENDING Order and redirects to /checkout/[orderId]. Buy Now button on listing detail page uses form action.

stories.title: Print Availability Toggle on Listing
stories.notes: 15 tests passing. PrintListing model dropped; availableForPrint/printSourceImageUrl/printProducts fields added to OriginalListing. updatePrintConfigAction validates seller ownership. All epic-7/8/10 tests updated for new schema.

stories.title: Prints Page (Filtered Browse)
stories.notes: 7 tests passing. /prints/page.tsx created with browseArtworks availability:print filter. SOLD originals with print enabled appear. Pagination works. Bugfix: browse page Prints tab was not passing availability filter — saleTypeParam "print" fell through auction/fixed mapping to undefined.

stories.title: Order a Print from Listing Page
stories.notes: 8 tests passing. createPrintOrderAction server action, PrintOptionsSelector client component, print section on detail page. fulfillPayment does not mark SOLD for PRINT orders.

stories.title: Structured Artwork Dimensions
stories.notes: Width/height/unit fields replace free-text dimensions. Validated in createListingAction and updateListingAction.

stories.title: Print Catalog Filtered by Aspect Ratio
stories.notes: filterByAspectRatio() in listing.ts filters catalog to ±10% ratio match, sorted by closeness.

stories.title: Print Cost Estimates in Setup
stories.notes: costs.json populated by fetch-prodigi-costs.ts. ~$X shown in PrintConfigForm. No runtime API calls.

stories.title: Admin User Role Elevation
stories.notes: 8 tests. updateUserRolesAction in actions/admin.ts; /admin/users page with UserRoleEditor client component. Toggle-on-click saves immediately. BUYER cannot be removed. Admin cannot remove own ADMIN role. Mobile layout fix: table-fixed with col widths (45/22/33%), email mid-truncated (first 15 chars + … + last 6) in monospace so Roles column never gets squeezed off-screen.

stories.title: Seller Thumbnail Links to Artwork Page
stories.notes: 4 tests. Thumbnail in seller listings wrapped in Link to /artwork/[artworkId].

stories.title: Edit Listing Button on Artwork Page
stories.notes: 4 tests. getArtworkDetail exposes sellerId. Artwork page shows Edit listing button when session user is the seller.

stories.title: Runner-Up Offer on Payment Expiry
stories.notes: 7 tests passing. Runner-up gets new PENDING order + email + notification when winner payment expires. Listing archived if no other bidders.

stories.title: Remove seller sign-up language from homepage
stories.notes: Homepage is buyer-facing only. Removed 'Start selling' hero button, replaced '03 Sell' how-it-works step with buyer-focused 'Bid' and 'Collect' steps, and dropped the seller CTA banner.

stories.title: Fix print order Prodigi flow, MSW sandbox intercept, purchase confirmation email
stories.notes: Three bugs fixed: (1) MSW v2 does not support RegExp URL patterns — replaced with explicit PRODIGI_BASES.flatMap() for both live and sandbox URLs so tests are intercepted correctly. (2) Print order Prodigi flow was broken: confirmShippingAction rejected PAID orders; now allows PENDING|PAID; creates Prodigi order + transitions to PROCESSING after shipping collected for PAID PRINT orders. (3) fulfillPayment() webhook guarded against calling Prodigi with empty shipping fields (shippingName check). sendPurchaseConfirmation now called from confirmShippingAction for PAID PRINT orders after Prodigi creation.

stories.title: Fix Vercel build: missing Link import + auth form contrast
stories.notes: artwork/[id]/page.tsx was missing `import Link from 'next/link'` causing TypeScript build failure on Vercel. Auth forms (sign-in, sign-up) wrapped in bg-white card so headings, links, and buttons have an explicit white surface instead of inheriting the stone-50 body; button softened to bg-stone-800.

stories.title: Upgrade Vercel to Pro and restore cron schedules
stories.notes: Restore close-auctions to */5 * * * * and payment-deadlines to 0 * * * * in vercel.json. Remove TODO comments in both route files.

stories.title: Swap sandbox credentials for live before go-live
stories.notes: In Vercel production env vars: (1) PRODIGI_API_KEY → live key from dashboard.prodigi.com; PRODIGI_API_BASE_URL → leave unset (defaults to live API). (2) STRIPE_SECRET_KEY → live sk_live_... key; NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY → live pk_live_... key; STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET → re-register webhook at api.stripe.com/webhooks pointing to production domain and use the new signing secret. Verify Stripe Connect is enabled for live mode. Double-check no test_ or sandbox keys remain in Vercel settings.

stories.title: Prodigi sandbox environment support
stories.notes: PRODIGI_API_BASE_URL env var added. Defaults to live API when unset; set to https://api.sandbox.prodigi.com/v4.0 in .env.local with a test_ key to avoid real fulfillment in dev. Updated .env.local.example and README.

stories.title: Verify DNS with Resend for transactional email
stories.notes: Add Resend DNS records to domain registrar, verify in Resend dashboard. Update RESEND_FROM_EMAIL env var on Vercel to use verified domain instead of onboarding@resend.dev.

stories.title: Request Password Reset
stories.notes: Forgot-password form → sends time-limited reset email. No account enumeration. Invalidates previous token.

stories.title: Set New Password via Reset Link
stories.notes: Token validation (expired/used/missing), password match + min length, marks token used, redirects to sign-in.

stories.title: Accept High-Resolution Artwork Uploads
stories.notes: Up to 70 MB via signed URL. JPEG/PNG/TIFF/WebP. Progress indicator. Client-side size and format validation. Bugfix: ActionResult imageId made optional so delete/setPrimary actions type-check correctly; ImageUploader guards the undefined case. Bugfix: new-listing page shows image placeholder for formats browsers cannot decode natively (e.g. TIFF); onError fallback prevents broken thumbnail. Bugfix: seller listings page used raw url instead of thumbnailUrl/gridUrl fallback chain, causing TIFF originals to fail to render.

stories.title: Automatic Image Variant Generation
stories.notes: Three variants: display (watermarked, 2400px max, JPEG 85), grid (800px max, JPEG 75), thumbnail (400×400 crop, JPEG 70). Stored in CDN, URLs on ArtworkImage. Blocking UX; form submit disabled until all images processed. Watermark: 'Art & Sol' diagonal, SVG sized to match output. Tests updated for two-pass sharp flow and brand watermark text. Bugfix: new-listing page hydration mismatch — Date.now() moved to stable useState initialisers; suppressHydrationWarning added to submit button for React 19 PE-driven disabled mismatch. Bugfix: TIFF variant generation — added sRGB normalisation and alpha flattening pass so CMYK/multi-channel TIFFs encode to JPEG correctly.

stories.title: Seller Can Regenerate Image Variants
stories.notes: Regenerate button (↺) on each image card in listing edit page. Calls regenerateVariantsAction server action which re-runs generateVariants for the given imageId. Auth-guarded (returns {error} not redirect), seller-ownership-checked; works for SOLD listings. EditListingForm images type updated to include displayUrl so ImageUploader does not re-queue already-processed images. BUG-2 fix included: deleteImageAction guards against deleting last image; ✕ button hidden in UI when only one image remains.

stories.title: Open Image Lightbox from Artwork Detail Page
stories.notes: Click image → full-screen lightbox with display variant. Darkened backdrop. Backdrop click closes. cursor-zoom-in on thumbnail.

stories.title: Carousel Navigation Inside Lightbox
stories.notes: Arrow buttons, keyboard left/right, swipe on touch. Wraps. Index indicator (n / total). Hidden when single image.

stories.title: Close Lightbox
stories.notes: × button top-right, Escape key, backdrop click. Body scroll locked while open; scroll position restored on close.

stories.title: Magnifier Lens on Hover in Lightbox
stories.notes: Circular lens follows cursor, 2–3× zoom, uses display variant for sharpness. Hidden on touch devices. Disappears on mouse leave. Distinct border.

stories.title: Mobile Navigation
stories.notes: Animated hamburger mobile nav (SVG bars→X, circular splash overlay, staggered items). Tab trap, Escape key, scroll lock. Active page underline+glow indicator (data-active). CSS focus ring on keyboard nav. 28 tests.

stories.epic: Epic 21: Stripe Checkout Sessions Migration & Payment UX
stories.title: Migrate Payment Collection to Stripe Checkout Sessions
stories.notes: 14 tests passing. createCheckoutSession added to stripe.ts (ui_mode: embedded); stripeSessionId field added to Order schema + migrated; /api/checkout-session route (401/400/200); webhook handles checkout.session.completed via fulfillPaymentBySession; MSW handlers for POST+GET /v1/checkout/sessions.

stories.epic: Epic 21: Stripe Checkout Sessions Migration & Payment UX
stories.title: Show Order Confirmation Immediately After Payment
stories.notes: 5 tests passing. fulfillPaymentBySession verifies Stripe session payment_status before marking PAID; resolveSessionFulfillment called on fulfill page load when ?session_id present — eliminates webhook race condition. Both are idempotent.

stories.epic: Epic 22: Buyer Order History & Order Detail
stories.title: Buyer Orders Page
stories.notes: 8 tests. getBuyerOrders() sorted newest-first, listingType, artwork/thumbnailUrl, null artwork for orphan prints. /buyer/orders page, dashboard order rows linked, Orders in nav.

stories.epic: Epic 22: Buyer Order History & Order Detail
stories.title: Order Detail Page
stories.notes: 11 tests. getOrderDetail() buyer-locked, full fields, shipping, tracking, seller email via artwork→seller, null artwork for orphan prints. /buyer/orders/[orderId] page with CancelOrderButton and ContactSupportModal client islands.

stories.epic: Epic 22: Buyer Order History & Order Detail
stories.title: Cancel Pending Order
stories.notes: 8 tests. cancelOrderAction: cancels PENDING, rejects PAID/SHIPPED/PROCESSING/CANCELLED, Unauthorized for no-session or wrong buyer. cancelOrderAction in src/app/actions/order.ts.

stories.epic: Epic 22: Buyer Order History & Order Detail
stories.title: Contact Support About an Order
stories.notes: 11 tests. contactSupportAction: Resend called, to=seller email, subject has Order #, message verbatim in body, blank/whitespace rejected, Unauthorized guards, Resend 500 returns error. sendSupportRequestEmail() added to email.ts.

stories.title: User Dropdown Menu in Desktop Nav
stories.notes: 44 tests. NavDropdown client component: toggle open/close, Escape+focus return, click-outside, role-dependent menu items (buyer/seller/admin), active page highlight, signed-out renders nothing. Nav.tsx wired up — flat inline role links removed from desktop nav, mobile menu unaffected. Admin dropdown includes /admin/tracker (labelled Tracker), /admin/users, /admin/fulfillment. Settings link routes by role (/buyer/settings, /seller/settings, /admin/settings). Seller settings page (Profile + bidReceivedEmails/saleCompletedEmails notifications). Admin settings page (Profile only). updateProfileAction revalidates role-specific path. updateSellerNotificationPrefsAction added. Obsolete 'Creating privileged accounts' callout removed from /admin/tracker page.

stories.title: Restructured Mobile Menu with Role-Aware Sections
stories.notes: 74 tests (48 new US-23.2 + 26 migrated US-20.1). MobileMenu drops flat `links` prop; now takes `roles: string[]`. Nav.tsx no longer pre-builds mobileLinks. Layout: Browse/Auctions/Prints always at top; signed-in users get name then HR (75vw wide) as section divider, then Dashboard (role href) + role links (BUYER: My Bids+Orders, SELLER: Listings, ADMIN: Admin+Users+Fulfillment) + Settings (role href) + Sign Out; signed-out gets Sign In + Sign Up. Active page highlight, overlay animation, Escape/tab-trap, scroll lock all preserved.

stories.epic: Epic 21: Stripe Checkout Sessions Migration & Payment UX
stories.title: Migrate Payment Collection to Stripe Checkout Sessions
stories.notes: 14 tests passing. createCheckoutSession added to stripe.ts (ui_mode: embedded); stripeSessionId field added to Order schema + migrated; /api/checkout-session route (401/400/200); webhook handles checkout.session.completed via fulfillPaymentBySession; MSW handlers for POST+GET /v1/checkout/sessions.

stories.epic: Epic 21: Stripe Checkout Sessions Migration & Payment UX
stories.title: Show Order Confirmation Immediately After Payment
stories.notes: 5 tests passing. fulfillPaymentBySession verifies Stripe session payment_status before marking PAID; resolveSessionFulfillment called on fulfill page load when ?session_id present — eliminates webhook race condition. Both are idempotent.

stories.title: Migrate transactional email from Resend to MailerSend
stories.notes: Replaced Resend fetch helper with MailerSend in src/lib/payments/email.ts. Updated MSW intercept URLs and to-field assertions in US-12.3 and US-22.4 tests to match MailerSend request shape ({ to: [{ email }] }). Fixed stale Art & Sol brand copy in verification and password reset emails. 800/800 tests passing. Also fixed global MSW handler in __tests__/mocks/handlers.ts (was still intercepting api.resend.com, letting real MailerSend calls through during test runs).

stories.title: Replace all Art & Sol brand references with Merch for the Future
stories.notes: Updated Nav.tsx logo, Footer.tsx copyright, variants.ts watermark SVG text, and US-18.2 watermark assertion. 800/800 tests passing.

stories.title: Update homepage with mission statement and brand copy
stories.notes: Replaced Art & Sol art-marketplace hero copy with MerchForTheFuture brand copy. Added mission statement section. Updated categories (Apparel/Prints/Originals) and how-it-works steps to match the apparel domain.
